backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a German payroll (Lohnabrechnung) backend with CRUD for wage entries, automatic amount calculation from quantity/rate/surcharge, Lohnsteuer storage, and a payroll summary computation including gross/net/social-insurance figures.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, used as build/documentation reference.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the TypeScript entry point via Vite.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up React Query, renders the app layout (header with Lohnabrechnung branding, WageCalculator main content, footer with caffeine.ai attribution), and provides the Sonner toast container.
frontend/src/components/PayrollSummary.t: Card component displaying a full German payroll summary with 9 computed values (Brutto, SV/Steuer deductions, Netto, Auszahlung), an editable Lohnsteuer input with save button, loading skeletons, and deductions shown in red.
frontend/src/components/WageEntryForm.ts: Controlled form component for creating or editing wage entries with fields for code, description, quantity, rate, surcharge, tax/SV/GB flags, a Pauschalbetrag toggle, live Betrag preview, and validation before submitting via React Query mutation.
frontend/src/components/WageEntryTable.t: Renders a table of wage entries with edit and delete actions, showing columns for wage type, description, quantity, rate, surcharge, tax/SV/GB flags, and amount, plus a totals footer row.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context backed by DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks and mutations for all backend operations: fetching/adding/updating/deleting wage entries, retrieving the payroll summary, and getting/setting Lohnsteuer, plus a utility to calculate Betrag.
frontend/src/hooks/useSeedDefaultEntries: Thin wrapper around useGetAllWageEntries that exposes seeding state (isSeeding, seedError, isSeeded) to indicate whether default wage entries have been loaded from the backend.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and JetBrains Mono fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a comprehensive set of CSS custom properties for both light and dark themes covering colors, table styles, and flag badges.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/WageCalculator.tsx: Main page component that orchestrates the wage calculator UI, managing form visibility and the selected entry for editing, and composing WageEntryForm, WageEntryTable, and PayrollSummary.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (including semantic table, sidebar, chart, and emerald accent colors), border radius, box shadows, and accordion keyframe animations. Enables dark mode via class, typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for the 'Lohnabrechnung' payroll calculator app, recording two pending feature requests: adding a PayrollSummary component (Steuer-Brutto, SV-Brutto, Nettoentgelt, Auszahlung) below the WageEntryTable on the WageCalculator page.
